Text.Page: If you're here to craft metalcrafter's hauberks, I have just the materials for you. Let me see what you come up with.

Nice, very nice. This is fine work, .

I'd say this is ready for the field. Deliver the hauberks to Arkaius in Cutthroat Harbor. He needs something that won't rust.
You've got the design and kits. Talk to the crafting vendors if you need additional materials.
Fine armor. This is just what we need to fight the Kazuur Syndicate. Thank you!
